title: Japanese Keto Chicken Gyoza
description: Crispy fried Japanese gyoza filled with chicken and served with a side of soy sauce for dipping.
instructions: Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the chicken breast, green onions, soy sauce, sesame oil, garlic, salt, and black pepper. Mix well.
Place a gyoza wrapper on a flat surface. Place a tablespoon of the chicken mixture in the center of the wrapper.
Fold the wrapper over the filling to form a triangle and press the edges together to seal the gyoza.
Repeat with the remaining wrappers and filling.
When the oil is hot, add a few of the gyoza to the pan (do not overcrowd). Fry for 2-3 minutes on each side or until golden brown.
Remove the gyoza from the oil with a slotted spoon and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the gyoza hot with a side of soy sauce for dipping.
